channel.title: Meat on Bell Favorite Recipes
channel.description: Recent content in Meat on Bell Favorite Recipes

item.title: Swiss Steak Slow Cooker
item.description:
Submitted by Murdena and Robert Burton

Cousins of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1-2 steaks
  • 1-14 oz can of tomatoes
  • 1 can mushroom pieces
  • 1 can beef consommé
  • 1 small onion, chopped
  • salt, pepper and garlic salt to taste

Instructions

Brown steak and onion. Season with salts and add remaining ingredients in slow cooker.

Simmer for 2-3 hours.

item.title: Sweet 'n' Sour Meatloaf
item.description:
Submitted by Jeannine and Elmer Bell

Parents of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 small onion, minced
  • ¼ cup crushed crackers (or bread crumbs)
  • 1-8 oz tin tomato sauce
  • ¼ cup brown sugar, packed
  • ¼ cup vinegar
  • 1 tsp prepared mustard
  • 1 egg
  • 2 lbs ground chuck
  • 1 ½ tsp salt
  • ¼ tsp pepper

Instructions

Mix tomato sauce with sugar, vinegar and mustard until sugar is dissolved. Put ½ cup of sauce mixture aside.

item.title: Sweet and Sour Meatballs
item.description:
Submitted by Billy Bell

Groom

  • 2 lbs hamburg
  • 1 cup milk
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1 cup bread crumbs
  • 2 eggs

Knead all ingredients together. Form meatballs and place on a cookie sheet. Cook at 350 degrees until brown.

Sauce:

Ingredients

  • 1 ½ cup brown sugar
  • 1 tsp dry mustard
  • ¾ cup ketchup
  • ¾ cup water
  • ¾ cup vinegar

Instructions

Mix ingredients together in a sauce pan. Bring to a boil. Mix

item.title: Stuffed Pork Chops
item.description:
Submitted by Kara MacDonald

Friend of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 2 tbsp butter
  • ½ pkg mushrooms, diced
  • 1 red pepper
  • 1 envelope of Lipton onion soup mix
  • 1 cup bread crumbs
  • ½ tsp pepper
  • 4 thick pork chops

Instructions

Combine vegetables and butter in sauce pan and cook until mushrooms are done. Add the soup mix, bread crumbs and pepper. Allow the mixture to cool.

Cut the pork chops on the side and make a pocket on the inside of the pork chop. Do not remove excess fat from the pork chops. Stuff the pockets with the above mixture.

item.title: Roast Shoulder of Pork With Stuffing
item.description:
Submitted by Pauline and Jim Cunningham

Friends of the Groom’s Family (Uncle Jim)

Stuffing:

Ingredients

  • 1/4 – 1/2 cup salt pork, diced
  • 5 apples, diced
  • 1/2 cup celery, chopped
  • 1/3 cup sugar
  • 1/2 cup onions, chopped
  • 2 cups dried bread crumbs
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped

Instructions

Fry salt pork until crisp. Remove from skillet. Cook celery, onion and parsley in fat for 5 minutes. Remove from skillet. Place apples in skillet and sprinkle with sugar. Cook covered until tender. Remove cover and continue to cook until juice evaporates. Add bread crumbs and other ingredients and mix well.

item.title: Roasted Bull Elephant
item.description:
Submitted by Lorraine and Frank Nault

Friends of the Bride’s Family

Ingredients

  • 1 elephant roast
  • ½ boxcar of bread crumbs
  • 3 crates of cut celery
  • 3 mailbags of chopped garlic cloves
  • 2 trash cans of scalding hot water
  • 50 lbs diced hot peppers
  • 1 keg salt
  • 2 oil drums of butter

Instructions

Blast off the rear end of one elephant to make large opening for stuffing. Mix ½ boxcar of bread crumbs, 3 mailbags of chopped garlic, 3 crates of cut celery and 2 trash cans of scalding hot water to moisten.

item.title: Rich's Sweet Balls
item.description:
Submitted by Anya and Rich Pagé

Friends of the Bride and Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 pkg of ground beef
  • ½ cup or so of bread crumbs
  • 1 egg
  • salt and pepper
  • 2 green onions, chopped
  • 1 tsp parsley flakes
  • 2 cloves of garlic, chopped
  • butter or oil to grease frying pan
  • 1 jar of honey garlic sauce (available in Chinese food section
  • of grocery store)

Instructions

In a large bowl, mix everything except honey garlic sauce and roll lovingly into balls. The balls like to be squeezed and played with so don’t hesitate to give them your full attention. If you drop a ball on the floor, throw it out, no one likes hairy balls.

item.title: Pork With Broccoli Stir Fry
item.description:
Submitted by Tina Sasyniuk and Kevin Long

Friends of the Bride and Groom

Ingredients

  • ¾ lb lean, boneless pork
  • 1 tbsp cornstarch
  • 1 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce
  • 1 tbsp cooking sherry
  • 1 bunch broccoli
  • 2 tbsp vegetable oil
  • 2 tbsp minced garlic cloves
  • 2 tbsp minced gingerroot
  • ¼ cup water
  • 2 tbsp hoisin sauce (optional) 25ml

Instructions

Slice pork thinly across the grain.

In a bowl, stir together cornstarch, soy sauce, and sherry. Add pork and stir to coat well. Separate broccoli into florets, peel stalks, then cut in 1 ½ inch pieces.

item.title: Poor Man's Lobster
item.description:
Submitted by Shelley Bzdell and Marc Robidas — Friends of the Groom

Ingredients

  • Fish filet
  • 7UP (enough to boil in)
  • Garlic butter

Instructions

Boil fish in 7UP until the filet floats.

Fry in garlic butter.

Enjoy the fine taste of lobster!

item.title: No Peek Chicken
item.description:
Submitted by Lacey Pigeau

Cousin of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 ½ cups white rice
  • 1-10 oz can condensed celery soup
  • 1-10 oz can condensed mushroom soup
  • 1 pkg dried onion soup
  • 1 cup milk
  • 4-5 skinless chicken breasts

Instructions

Mix soup, milk and rice. Place mixture in a casserole dish. Lay chicken on top. Cover with foil and cook at 325 degrees for 2 hours. Do not peek!

item.title: Manilla Chicken
item.description:
Submitted by Stephanie Lemaire and John Breton

Friends of the Bride and Groom

Ingredients

  • 6 boneless, skinless chicken breasts
  • 1 cup onion, finely chopped
  • 1/3 cup white vinegar
  • 1/3 cup soya sauce
  • 1/2 cup water
  • 2 tbsp granulated sugar
  • 1/8 tsp garlic powder
  • 1/4 tsp salt
  • 1/8 tsp pepper

Instructions

Arrange chicken breasts in a single layer in a large saucepan. Mix remaining 8 ingredients in a small bowl. Pour over chicken. Cover. Bring to a boil. Lower heat and simmer for

item.title: Gord's Homemade Jerky
item.description:
Submitted by Patsy and Gord Bell

Sister-in-law and Brother of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 ½ kg meat (any kind, no fat)
  • 1 bottle soya sauce
  • ½ bottle Worcestershire sauce
  • ½ - 1 cup of brown sugar
  • a few cloves of garlic

Instructions

Cut meat into 1/8-1/4 inch thick strips. Make sure there is no fat on the meat. Cut with the grain for chewier jerky.

Mix the rest of the ingredients and taste to your liking. Add meat strips, cover and refrigerate for at least 24 hours.

item.title: Dan's Chili
item.description:
Submitted by Linda and Mike Gosson

Parents of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 1 cup onions, chopped
  • 1 cup celery, chopped
  • 1 can kidney beans
  • 1 tbsp chili powder
  • 1 ½ tsp salt
  • 1 tbsp vinegar
  • 1 cup green peppers
  • 1 lb ground beef
  • 1 large can tomatoes (I use stewed whole tomatoes)
  • ¼ tsp pepper
  • ½ - 1 tsp crushed red pepper

Instructions

Brown beef, onion, celery, and green peppers. Add remaining ingredients and simmer for 1 hour stirring frequently.

item.title: Crock Pot Beans
item.description:
Submitted by Tom Alexander

Friend of the Bride and Groom

Ingredients

  • 3 cups beans
  • 6 cups water
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1 onion, chopped
  • ½ lb green bacon or regular bacon (I use a chunk of salt pork)
  • ½ cup molasses
  • 1 cup ketchup
  • ¼ cup brown sugar
  • 2 tsp dry mustard

Instructions

Place everything in the crock pot and let cook on low for 15-20 hours or on high for 5-7 hours. (7 hours seemed to work best)

item.title: Chicken Parmesan
item.description:
Submitted by Charlene and Leonard Gillis

Cousins of the Groom

Ingredients

  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts
  • ¼ cup parmesan cheese
  • 2 cups tomato sauce (or leftover spaghetti sauce)
  • ½ - 1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese

Instructions

Put ½ cup of sauce in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish. Place the chicken on top of the sauce and pour remaining sauce over chicken.

Sprinkle parmesan cheese over the sauce and chicken and place in a preheated 350 degree oven. Bake for about 1 ½ hours or until chicken is tender when poked with a fork.

item.title: Chicken à la King
item.description:
Submitted by Rachelle and Tom Pigeau — Cousins of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 2 cups chopped, cooked chicken breast
  • Frozen vegetables (optional)
  • 1 can cream of chicken soup
  • 1/2 can milk (or water)
  • 1/2 cup mozzarella cheese, shredded
  • 1 pouch Stove Top stuffing mix
  • 1 cup water

Instructions

Layer chicken and frozen vegetables in a medium baking dish.

Mix cream of chicken soup with 1/2 can of milk (or water) and pour over top of chicken and vegetables.

item.title: Becky's Sweet and Sour Chicken Wings
item.description:
Submitted by Becky and Darren Shackleton

Friends of the Bride and Groom

Ingredients

  • 1 large package of wings (about 25)
  • ¾ cup of soya sauce
  • ½ cup ketchup
  • ½ cup water
  • ½ cup brown sugar
  • 2 tsp flour

Instructions

Take a large glass casserole dish and mix soya sauce, ketchup, water and brown sugar. Add the flour and mix well. Add the wings in the dish and place in oven for 40 minutes at 400 degrees.

item.title: Bacon Mushroom Swiss Meatloaf
item.description:
Submitted by Darcy Lloyd

Cousin of the Bride

Ingredients

  • 12 ozs of bacon, diced
  • 4 medium white mushrooms, chopped
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 1 ½ lbs extra lean ground beef
  • 1 egg
  • ¼ cup evaporated milk or half and half
  • 6 ozs shredded swiss cheese
  • ½ cup corn flake crumbs

Instructions

In a large skillet, cook bacon until crisp but not burnt. Remove with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel to drain and cool. Remove all but a tablespoon of the bacon fat from the skillet and sauté the mushrooms and onions until tender. Allow to cool slightly.

item.title: Fast Cabbage Roll Skillet
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb medium ground beef or pork
  • 2 cloves garlic, crushed
  • 1 large onion, chopped
  • 1 14-oz tin tomato sauce
  • ½ cup water
  • 1 cup 5-minute rice
  • 1 tsp paprika½ tsp dried
  • dill weed
  • ¼ tsp each salt and pepper
  • ½ head cabbage
  • sour cream

Instructions

In large, wide saucepan over medium heat, cook meat and garlic, stirring often with fork to keep meat crumbly. Add 1 or 2 tsp of vegetable oil if meat sticks.

item.title: Corey's Chicken Wings
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 cups white sugar
  • 1 cup water
  • ½ tsp garlic
  • 5 Tbsp soya sauce

Instructions

Wash and place wings in pan. Melt sugar in water, Add garlic and soya sauce. Marinade for 1 hour. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 2-1/2 to 3 hours till sauce is thick and bubbly.

Stir every ½ hour.

item.title: Chicken & Dumplings
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 5-1/2 to 6 lb boiling fowl
  • 8 cups water
  • 5-6 medium-large carrots, chunked
  • 12 whole medium onions
  • 1 tsp salt
  • 1/8 tsp pepper

Instructions

In large soup kettle, simmer the whole fowl with the water, covered, until tender – about 4 hours. Be sure it is beginning to fall apart. Left bird to utility tray and cut it into serving pieces discarding what skin and bones you readily can. Set this meat aside for the time being. Skim as much surplus fat as you can from the top of broth.NOTE;I usually do the above a day early so refrigerated fat is easy to scoop off the next day. Add the carrots, onions, salt and pepper and cook until vegetables are tender. Put chicken pieces in stew and when stew is boiling hard, put in dumplings.

item.title: Chicken A La Chuk
item.description:
Ingredients

  • Chicken legs, breasts or whatever
  • 1 tin beef consommé or broth
  • ½ cup brown sugar
  • ½ tsp ginger
  • ½ tsp garlic salt
  • 2 Tbsp soya sauce

Instructions

Heat consommé, brown sugar, ginger, garlic salt and soya sauce on stove. Put chicken in broiler pan and pour sauce over. Bake at 350 F. for 45 to 60 minutes.

item.title: Career Girl's Spaghetti
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 tbsp salad oil or shortening
  • 1 cup minced onions
  • 1 cup sliced mushrooms
  • 3 tbsp flour
  • 4 franks, chopped
  • 1-1/2 cups tomato juice
  • 1 cup water
  • 1.5 tbsp Worcestershire
  • ¼ tsp salt
  • ¼ tsp pepper
  • 2 tbsp snipped parsley
  • ¼ cup minced green pepper
  • 1 8-oz pkg spaghetti
  • Parmesan cheese

Instructions

In oil in skillet, sauté onions and mushrooms till golden. Stir in flour, chopped franks. Add tomato juice, water, Worcestershire, salt and pepper. Simmer, uncovered, 25 minutes. Add parsley, green pepper. Simmer 5 minutes longer. Meanwhile, cook spaghetti as package directs. Serve ring of spaghetti with sauce in center. Pass the cheese.

item.title: Campbell's Zesty Tomato Pork Chops
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 4 pork chops (about 1 lb/500 gr.)
  • 1 large red or green pepper,cut in strips
  • 1 can Condensed Tomato with Basil &Oregano Soup
  • ¼ cup water
  • 1 Tbsp vinegar
  • 1 Tbsp packed brown sugar
  • 1 Tbsp Worcestershire sauce
  • 3 cups hot cooked mini potatoes

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add pork chops and cook until browned on both sides. Set pork chops aside. Add pepper strips and stir fry – about 3 minutes. Drain fat. Reduce heat to medium.

item.title: Campbell's Speedy Broccoli Cheese Omelettes
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 tsp vegetable oil
  • 1 can Broccoli & Cheese Soup
  • 8 eggs
  • 2 cups cooked, chopped broccoli
  • dash ground black pepper
  • grated Parmesan cheese

Instructions

Mix eggs gradually into soup with whisk or fork. Stir in half the broccoli and pepper.

Heat 1 tsp oil in non-stick 10” skillet or omelette pan, over medium heat

Add ¾ cup egg mixture. As it begins to set, lift edges allowing uncooked egg mixture to flow to bottom. Cook until set but still moist. Top one half with ¼ cup broccoli.

item.title: Campbell's Shortcut Spaghetti & Meat Sauce
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • ¾ lb ground beef, cooked and drained
  • ¼ cup diced onions
  • ¼ cup diced celery
  • 1 can Tomato w/Basil & Oregano Soup
  • ¾ cup water
  • 5 cups hot cooked spaghetti
  • ¼ cup grated Romano or Parmesan cheese

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet and stir fry onions and celery until tender.

Stir in mixture or soup, water and cooked ground beef. Bring to boil; reduce heat to low.

item.title: Campbell's Shortcut Chicken a la King
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • ½ cup chopped red or green pepper
  • ½ cup chopped celery
  • 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup
  • 1/3 cup milk2 cups cooked chicken, cubed
  • 1 cup frozen green peas
  • dash ground black pepper, optional
  • 4 cups hot cooked rice or pasta

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add pepper and celery and stir fry until tender crisp. Reduce heat to medium.

Stir in mixture of soup and milk Add chicken, peas and pepper. Heat through, stirring occasionally. Serve over rice or pasta. If desired, garnish with fresh parsley.

item.title: Campbell's Shortcut Beef Stroganoff
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lb boneless beef sirloin or inside roundsteak, cut in strips
  • 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup
  • 1-1/2 cups frozen green peas
  • 1 large onion, chopped
  • ½ tsp Worcestershire saucee
  • ¾ sup sour cream
  • 1/8 tsp ground black pepper
  • 4 cups hot cooked egg noodles

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add beef and cook until browned and cooked through. Add onions and stir fry until tender. Reduce heat to medium

item.title: Campbell's Orange Beef Stir-Fry
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lb boneless beef sirloin or inside roundsteak, cut in strips
  • 1 medium green pepper,cut in strips
  • 1 medium onion, sliced
  • 1 can Condensed Tomato Soup
  • ¼ cup orange juice
  • 2 Tbsp soya sauce
  • 1 Tbsp vinegar
  • 1 tsp garlic powder
  • 4 cups hot cooked rice

Instructions

Heat half the oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add beef and stir fry until cooked through. Reduce heat to medium. Set beef aside.

item.title: Campbell's Easy Santa Fe Chicken
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 Tbsp all-purpose flour
  • 1 Tbsp chili powder
  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breasthalves (about 1 lb/500 gr.)
  • 2 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lg red or green pepper, cut in strips
  • 1 can Fiesta Tomato or Tomato Soup
  • 1 cup corn niblets
  • ¼ cup shredded Cheddar or Monterey
  • 4 cups hot cooked rice
  • Jack cheese

Instructions

Mix flour and chili powder. Coat chicken with flour mixture.

Heat oil in large skillet over medium heat. Add chicken and cook until browned on both sides. Set chicken aside, Drain fat.

item.title: Campbell's Easy Chicken Broccoli Paprikash
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves,(about 1 pound/500 grams)
  • 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup
  • 2 tsp paprika (or to taste)
  • ½ medium red pepper, cut in strips
  • 2 cups hot cooked broccoli florets
  • 1/3 cup sour cream or plain yogurt
  • 4 cups hot cooked egg noodles

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add chicken and cook until browned on both sides. Set chicken aside. Reduce heat to medium.

item.title: Campbell's Easy Chicken & Broccoli Divan
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 cups hot cooked broccoli spears
  • 2 cups cooked chicken, cubed*
  • 1 can Cream of Broccoli Soup
  • 1/3 cup milk
  • ½ cup shredded Cheddar cheese
  • 3 Tbsp dry bread crumbs
  • 1 Tbsp margarine or butter, melted

Instructions

*For Easy Turkey & Broccoli Divan, substitute turkey for chicken.

Arrange broccoli and chicken in 9-inch pie plate or 2 quart shallow baking dish. Combine soup and milk; pour over broccoli and chicken.

item.title: Campbell's Citrus Skillet Chicken & Rice
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves,(about 1 lb/500 gr.)
  • 1-1/4 cups Campbell’s Ready to UseBroth or 1 can Condensed ChickenBroth.
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • ¾ cup orange juice
  • 1 cup uncooked regular long grain rice
  • 1-1/2 cups fresh (cut-up) or frozen greenbeans
  • 1 tsp grated orange peel
  • 3 Tbsp chopped fresh parsley or l Tbsp dried parsley flakes

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add chicken and cook until browned on both sides. Set chicken aside.

item.title: Campbell's Chicken & Vegetable Rice Skillet
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lb Boneless, skinless chicken breasthalves, cut in cubes
  • 1 can Cream of Chicken Soup
  • 1 cup water
  • 1 pkg (6 oz/165 g) seasoned long-grainrice mix
  • 2 cups thinly sliced carrots
  • 2 green onions, sliced

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high heat in large skillet. Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides. Reduce heat to medium.

Stir in mixture of soup, water, rice mix and carrots. Heat to a boil. Reduce heat to low.

item.title: Campbell's Chicken & Vegetable Rotini
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breasts,cut in chunks
  • 1 can Condensed Cream of Celery Soup
  • 2-1/4 cups water2 cups fresh (cut-up) or frozen veggie mix
  • ½ tsp dried basil leaves
  • 2 cups uncooked rotini pasta

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add chicken and stir fry until cooked through.

Stir in mixture of soup, water, vegetables and basil; heat to a boil, stirring often.

item.title: Campbell's Broccoli Chicken Potato Parmesan
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 8 mini red-skinned potatoes, thinly sliced
  • 1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breasthalves, cut in strips
  • 1 can Cream of Broccoli Soup
  • ½ cup milk
  • ¼ tsp garlic powder
  • 2 cups fresh or frozen broccoli florets
  • 1/3 cup grated Parmesan cheese

Instructions

Heat oil at medium-high in large skillet. Add potato slices and stir fry until tender crisp.

Add chicken and continue to stir fry until chicken is browned on all sides. Reduce heat to medium.

item.title: Campbell's Beef & Mushroom Skillet
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 lb boneless beef sirloin or inside roundsteak, cut in strips
  • 2 cups sliced mushrooms
  • 1 medium onion, sliced
  • 1 can Condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup
  • ½ cup water
  • 2 Tbsp Dijon-style mustard
  • 4 cups hot cooked rice

Instructions

Heat half the oil in large skillet over medium high heat. Add beef and brown until cooked through. Set beef aside. Reduce heat to medium.

Add remaining oil. Add mushrooms and onion and stir fry until tender.

item.title: Batter Franks
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 egg
  • ½ cup milk
  • 1 cup Bisquick
  • 2 tbsp yellow corn meal
  • ¼ tsp paprika
  • ½ tsp dry mustard
  • 1/8 tsp cayenne pepper
  • 1 lb (12) frankfurters

Instructions

Heat deep fat to 375 degrees. Blend egg and milk. Stir in dry ingredients. Dip frankfurters into batter. Fry until brown – 2 to 3 minutes

NOTE: Do not use previously frozen wieners as batter will not stick to them.

item.title: Barbecued Spareribs
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 lbs spareribs
  • ¼ cup vinegar
  • 1 cup sliced onions
  • ¼ cup brown sugar
  • 1 cup ketchup
  • 2 tsp dry mustard
  • 1 cup water
  • 1 tsp paprika
  • 2 tsp salt
  • 2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce

Instructions

Cut ribs into serving pieces. Brown them in frying pan. Combine the remaining ingredients and pour over ribs. Cover. Bake in moderate oven at 350 degrees for 1-3/4 hrs. Spoon sauce over the ribs two or three times during baking. Then uncover and cook for 15 minutes.

item.title: Baked Chili
item.description:
Ingredients

  • ¾ lb lean ground beef
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 1 28-oz tin diced tomatoes
  • 1 10 oz tin beef broth
  • 1 14 oz tin kidney beans
  • 1 medium green pepper, chopped
  • 1 tbsp chili powder
  • ½ tsp cumin
  • 2/3 cup long grain rice
  • ¾ cup shredded cheddar cheese

Instructions

Brown beef with onion in large skillet. Drain off fat. Stir in tomatoes, ½ cup reconstituted beef broth (half broth, half water) with 28-oz tin tomatoes, kidney beans, green pepper, chili powder and cumin. Bring to a boil. Stir in rice. Pour into a 3-quart (3L) casserole. Cover. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes. Uncover and stir. Sprinkle with cheese. Bake uncovered 10 minutes longer or until rice is tender.

item.title: Aloha Sweet & Sour Pork
item.description:
• 1 lb lean boneless pork chops, cut into thin strips
  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • 1 tsp minced fresh ginger or ½ tsp powdered ginger
  • 2 Tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 pkg Polynesian mix veggies

Homemade Sauce:

Ingredients

  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • 1 tsp minced fresh ginger or 1/2tsp powdered ginger
  • 1-1/2 Tbsp corn starch
  • 1/2 tsp powdered ginger
  • ½ cup fruit juice or broth
  • 1 Tbsp each sugar and ketchup
  • 2 Tbsp each vinegar and soya sauce

Instructions

Combine pork, garlic and ginger; season with salt and pepper to taste. Mix well. In large frying pan or wok over high heat, heat half of the oil. Add pork. Stir-fry 2 minutes. Remove pork from pan. Set aside.
